WE NOW DELIVER VANS & CARS

TO THE LOCAL AREA!

[CLICK HERE TO GET A QUICK QUOTE](https://www.kingfishercarrental.co.uk/quote.php)

-  Low Cost Car & Van Hire
-  Local Collection & Delivery
-  Fully Inclusive Prices

-  No Hidden Costs
-  Cheapest Weekly Rates
-  7 Seaters Available

Kingfisher Car & Van Rental is a small, family run business covering the South East. We provide short and long-term rentals from multiple locations.

All Kingfisher Car & Van Rental's vehicle prices are inclusive of VAT, insurance, 24hr breakdown cover and mileage allowance. Our business is built around superb customer service and highly competitive prices.

Kingfisher Car & Van Rental have a wide selection of cars, from ‘small run-arounds’ to family hatchbacks and 7-seater people carriers. We are always happy to quote for any rental period, whether it be for a day, a month, a weekend or a year, for business or for pleasure. Just tell us your requirements and we will do our best to accommodate you.

We pride ourselves on our fleet of vehicles because we are very particular about our cars and passionate about our customer service. All our vehicles are immaculately presented and valeted, fully ready for your use.

The areas we cover are:
Guildford, Woking, Godalming, Richmond, Kingston, Twickenham, Weybridge, Byfleet & Walton-on-Thames.
